title: The acceleration is here!
summary: Google's Co-scientist system automates medical discoveries across cancer, antibiotic resistance, and vision loss. Robin is an AI agent system that uses a consensus mechanism to identify treatments and genetic connections, demonstrating breakthrough applications in drug combinations and rare disease research.
